reasons: Lolita protects Clint from projectile pressure and gives him a stable front wall to play behind.
Clint can use his ranged poke more safely while Lolita blocks the enemy's return damage angle.

proof.summary: Lolita blocks incoming ranged pressure while Clint uses his long-range poke and burst from safer spacing.
worksBestWhen: Lolita angles her shield toward the main ranged threat.
Clint plays behind Lolita instead of stepping into engage range.
failureCases: Enemy divers attack Clint from behind or the side.
Lolita's shield is unavailable during the enemy's poke window.

reasons: Tigreal can lock enemies in place, allowing Clint to land burst follow-up without overextending.
Clint can punish controlled targets from range after Tigreal starts the fight.

proof.summary: Tigreal creates the crowd-control setup, while Clint follows with ranged burst on controlled targets.
worksBestWhen: Tigreal engages inside Clint's follow-up range.
Clint saves key damage for the confirmed setup.
failureCases: Tigreal catches targets behind terrain or outside Clint's range.
Clint is pressured before he can follow up.

reasons: Rafaela helps Clint maintain spacing with heal and movement support during poke trades.
Clint benefits from Rafaela's disengage support when enemies try to collapse on his backline position.

proof.summary: Rafaela improves Clint's ability to reposition between poke cycles, making it easier for him to avoid being collapsed on.
worksBestWhen: Rafaela supports Clint before enemy dive reaches him.
Clint uses the speed window defensively, not only to chase.
failureCases: Enemy assassins burst Clint before Rafaela can react.
Clint steps too far forward after winning a trade.

reasons: Minotaur gives Clint frontline cover, healing, and peel so Clint can keep dealing damage safely.
Clint can punish enemies who enter Minotaur's control zone.

proof.summary: Minotaur creates space and absorbs pressure while Clint punishes enemies who enter his poke range.
worksBestWhen: Minotaur guards Clint against enemy dive.
Clint positions behind Minotaur's control zone.
failureCases: Minotaur engages away from Clint and leaves him exposed.
Enemy flankers avoid the frontline and reach Clint directly.

reasons: Angela gives Clint a defensive safety layer when enemies commit onto him.
Clint can counter-burst or reposition after Angela helps him survive the first dive window.

proof.summary: Angela protects Clint during enemy dive timing, helping him survive long enough to reposition and counter-burst.
worksBestWhen: Angela saves protection for the enemy's real engage.
Clint still has escape or damage cooldowns after Angela joins.
failureCases: Angela uses her protection too early.
Clint is caught by repeated crowd control after the shield window.
